summary.conclusion: Visible Computer Use verification still requires real screenshots, logs, notes, and save snapshots before gameplay can pass.

captureProtocol: Use ECHO Launcher or the owning edition capture kit to start from a fresh install and fresh world/profile.
Use visible UI automation to open inventory and verify Index, HUD, Terminal, HoloMap, Lens, family objective surfaces, save/reload, and no-crash evidence where applicable.
Record Computer Use attempts with the generated command, but treat that platform report as provenance only.
Import the actual screenshots, logs, notes, and save snapshots through the owning family/edition evidence importer before setting gameplay claims true.
Do not treat install, handoff, content graph load, or Hytale export planning as gameplay proof.

blockerSample: Missing real gameplay evidence JSON for launch/world/UI/creative-tab proof.

verificationChecks.label: Client/game window started
verificationChecks.captureHint: Launch the lane from ECHO Launcher and capture the game/client start log.

verificationChecks.label: Native main menu replacement visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Native lane only: capture the ECHO/Ashfall native main menu replacement.

verificationChecks.label: World or profile loaded
verificationChecks.captureHint: Create or load a fresh Ashfall world/profile and capture it after load.

verificationChecks.label: HUD visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Capture the in-game HUD after world entry.

verificationChecks.label: Inventory Index visible after opening inventory
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open inventory and capture the Index surface.

verificationChecks.label: Terminal visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open Terminal and capture it.

verificationChecks.label: HoloMap visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open HoloMap and capture it.

verificationChecks.label: Lens visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open or equip Lens and capture the visible Lens UI/effect.

verificationChecks.label: Creative tab visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open creative inventory and capture the ECHO/Ashfall creative tab.

verificationChecks.label: Creative tab search visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Use creative search and capture the result.

verificationChecks.label: Creative item selectable
verificationChecks.captureHint: Select an ECHO/Ashfall creative item and capture the selection.

verificationChecks.label: Creative item usable in world
verificationChecks.captureHint: Use the selected item in the world and capture the visible effect/log.

verificationChecks.label: Save/reload verified
verificationChecks.captureHint: Save, reload, and capture the restored world/profile state.

evidenceRequirements.screenshots: Required for visible UI checks such as HUD, inventory Index, Terminal, HoloMap, Lens, creative tab, and objective completion.
evidenceRequirements.logs: Required for launcher/client start, runtime no-crash review, and timed playthrough evidence.
evidenceRequirements.saveSnapshots: Required for timed playthroughs, primary objective completion, and save/reload verification.
evidenceRequirements.notes: Required to describe tester, profile/world, exact route, start/end times, and no-crash review.

verificationChecks.label: Fresh world/profile created

verificationChecks.label: HUD visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Capture the in-game HUD after the world/profile is loaded.

verificationChecks.label: Inventory Index visible after opening inventory
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open inventory and capture the Index or equivalent catalog surface.

verificationChecks.label: Terminal visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open Terminal from the in-game UI or assigned key path.

verificationChecks.label: HoloMap visible
verificationChecks.captureHint: Open HoloMap or the family equivalent map/navigation surface.

verificationChecks.label: First 30 minutes captured
verificationChecks.captureHint: Capture a real first 30-minute run from the fresh world/profile.

verificationChecks.label: First 2 hours captured
verificationChecks.captureHint: Capture a real first 2-hour run from the same release lane.

verificationChecks.label: Signal Crown objective completed
verificationChecks.captureHint: Complete the Signal Crown objective and capture the completion state.

verificationChecks.label: Save/reload verified
verificationChecks.captureHint: Save, exit or return to launcher/menu, reload, then capture the restored state.

verificationChecks.label: No-crash review completed
verificationChecks.captureHint: Review logs/crash reports after the run and record a no-crash note.
